extDescription.message: Smartphone and tablet simulator on computer with several models to test mobile responsive websites.

error_contact.message: {Please contact us} if the problem persists.

context_menu_activate.message: Activate mobile view on this tab

popup_site_incompatible.message: The simulator cannot be activated on this native page of your browser. Try another tab or browse a site and then relaunch.

popup_activate_local_files_info.message: This simulator cannot be activated by default on local files (file:///) but you can manually enable the option in Chrome settings.

menu_contact_devices.message:  The device you're looking for isn't in the list? Let us know!

menu_info_device.message: Features and mockup of this terminal

menu_share.message: Share with a colleague, a friend,...

menu_faq_media_queries.message: My media queries are not being considered

menu_faq_ignonito_mode.message: How to activate the simulator in incognito mode?

menu_faq_scroll.message: Unable to scroll in the simulator

menu_faq_shortcut.message: How to set up keyboard shortcuts?

menu_vote_feature.message: Vote for the features you want

simulator_header_info.message: This is just an image. To change the URL use the Chrome field above.

simulator_footer_info.message: This is just an image. Use your own keyboard.

screencast_tooltip_device.message: Video capture of the terminal only

screencast_tooltip_tab.message: Video capture of the tab with the terminal

screencast_error.message: An error occurred during recording. {Click here} for a workaround.

screencast_modale_texte.message: You can download this video in different formats or get a share link.

screencast_modale_download_webm.message: Download in default WEBM format (with transparency if option enabled)

screencast_modale_download_mp4.message: Better compatibility with PowerPoint, but no transparency

screencast_modale_download_gif.message: Compatible everywhere, but lower quality (with transparency if option enabled)

screencast_modale_gif_duration_limit_inf.message: The maximum duration of a GIF is 60 seconds. Beyond that, the file would be too large.

screencast_modale_contact.message: Report a bug, suggest an improvement

screencast_error_media_stream_track_proc.message: Your version of Chrome is too old for this feature. Please update Chrome to a version higher than 94.0

screencast_quality_info_tooltip.message: Video quality affects the bitrate, fps & resolution of the recording. The higher the quality, the larger the file.

screencast_modale_auto_stop_limit_reache.message: Video recordings are limited to 5 minutes in the free version.

screenshot_modale_download_webp.message: Download in WEBP format, compatible almost everywhere and optimized compression (recommended)

screenshot_menu_stop_fullpage.message: Stop before the end of the page

screenshot_modale_copy.message: Copy the image to the clipboard

screenshot_modale_help.message: To save the image in large format, simply right-click on it and then "Copy image" or "Save".

pro_modale_h1_all_formats.message: Convert your video captures to GIF and MP4 formats

pro_modale_h2.message: Become a PRO and actively contribute to the development of this extension by supporting its developer.

sharing_h1.message: Is this mobile simulator useful to you?

sharing_h2.message: Then share it with your colleagues or friends

sharing_txt.message: Simulator to test your site on mobile & tablet

sharing_review_1.message: And if you have a minute to

sharing_review_3.message: then it's the icing on the cake! 🙂

other_extensions_h1.message: Discover our brand new free extensions

other_extensions_color_picker_descriptio.message: This extension allows you to capture any color on the screen.

other_extensions_font_finder_description.message: Identify with one click the font used on any text of a web page.

review_h1.message: How would you rate this extension?

review_note_store.message: Thank you for your feedback, feel free to add a rating on the Google Store. I would be very grateful 😊

review_note_feedback.message: Thank you for your feedback, feel free to send us a message so we can improve this extension.

contact_message_field_placeholder.message: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra, iPhone 17 Pro Max, etc.

contact_title.message: The device you're looking for isn't in the list? Let us know!

settings_hide_header_footer.message: Hide the top and bottom elements of the browser in the webview (PWA)

settings_hide_keyboard.message: Do not display the fake keyboard on focus of an input field

settings_scrollbar_show.message: Show the native scrollbar in the terminal

settings_change_cursor.message: Do not change the cursor style in the webview

settings_change_analytics.message: I help the developer of this extension improve their product with Posthog. All data is anonymized.

settings_batterie_level.message: Battery level in the terminal header (%)

settings_device_default_url.message: Change the URL displayed in the terminal

settings_presenter_mode.message: Presentation mode (right menu visible only on hover)

settings_fullscreen.message: Site in full screen in the terminal

settings_transparent_background_info.message: This option involves more calculations and thus a potential slowdown of the display depending on your computer (only compatible with WEBM and GIF formats)

screenshot_workaround_context_text.message: Due to certain technical limitations, it is possible that during the screenshot, you receive this error message.

screenshot_workaround_solution_text.message: In this case, to start the capture, simply right-click anywhere on the page, choose the "Mobile Simulator" entry, then "📷 Take a screenshot"

feedback_title.message: Help us make Mobile FIRST even more useful for you 🚀

feedback_use_cases.message: Why do you use Mobile FIRST?

feedback_useCases_placeholder.message: Test my site, do client demos...

feedback_frequency.message: How often do you use this extension?

feedback_improvements.message: What improvements would you like to see?

feedback_improvements_placeholder.message: An idea, a friction, a lack...

feedback_submitted.message: Thank you very much for your feedback 🤗

new_ios26_h1.message: Discover now the new "Liquid Glass" interface of Safari iOS 26 for even more realistic tests!

new_ios26_h2.message: Available on all variants of iPhone 15 and iPhone 16

new_iphone_17_h1.message:
New!
Test your sites now with the iPhone 17.

new_iphone_17_h2.message: The iPhone 17, iPhone  Air, iPhone 17 PRO & iPhone 17 PRO MAX are available in the simulator.

new_video_feature_h1.message: Discover now the new video capture feature!

new_video_feature_h2.message: Record with better quality, with new options and with transparent background

logout_modale_title.message: You have been automatically logged out on this device

logout_modale_message.message: This device is no longer part of your authorized terminals. If you removed this access manually, a new login is required.

logout_modale_message_2.message: ℹ️ Want to share your subscription? To authorize others, simply add them from the "Users" section of your account.

notification_update_title_v100_100_100.message:
InformationTouch scroll is not available, but you can display the scrollbar if you don't have a mouse wheel or a trackpad to scroll.

This is an option in the settings at the bottom right 

notification_update_title_vwelcome.message:
Welcome to Mobile FIRST 👋Simulate phones, tablets, and computers with one click to easily test and view your sites.

The menu is on the right ➡️

notification_update_title_v4_12_0.message: Update v4.12.0New feature in PRO version, screenshot editing. Buttons to draw shapes, add text, etc. 

notification_update_title_v4_14_0.message: Update v4.14.0Discover now the new video capture feature! 

notification_update_title_v4_14_5.message: Update v4.14.5Significant increase in resolution and quality of screenshots 
